zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre III de ROSTRENEN於大約1210年出生在法國布列塔尼o-度-諾爾德洛斯特倫時，他的父親Pierre II de Rostrenen75歲，母親Mahete de Fougères75歲。他於大約1235年與Jeanne de PARTHENAY結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre III de ROSTRENEN于大约1210年出生在法国布列塔尼o-度-諾爾德洛斯特倫时，他的父亲Pierre II de Rostrenen75岁，母亲Mahete de Fougères75岁。他于大约1235年与Jeanne de PARTHENAY结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre III de ROSTRENEN was born about 1210, in Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Brittany, France, his father, Pierre II de Rostrenen, was 75 and his mother, Mahete de Fougères, was 75. He married Jeanne de PARTHENAY about 1235. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre III de ROSTRENEN est né environ 1210, à Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, France, son père, Pierre II de Rostrenen, avait 75 ans et sa mère, Mahete de Fougères, avait 75 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de PARTHENAY environ 1235. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre III de ROSTRENEN um 1210 in Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pierre II de Rostrenen 75 und seine Mutter Mahete de Fougères 75. Er hat um 1235 Jeanne de PARTHENAY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre III de ROSTRENEN è nato il circa 1210 nel Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Pierre II de Rostrenen, aveva 75 anni e il suo madre, Mahete de Fougères, aveva 75 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de PARTHENAY circa 1235. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre III de ROSTRENENが約1210年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ドウ-ノードロストリーンで生まれた時，父Pierre II de Rostrenenは75歳，母Mahete de Fougèresは75歳であった。約1235年にJeanne de PARTHENAYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre III de ROSTRENEN(이)가 대략 1210년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드-노르드 로스트렌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pierre II de Rostrenen(은)는 75세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahete de Fougères(은)는 75세였다. 그는 대략 1235년 Jeanne de PARTHENAY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre III de ROSTRENEN nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Pierre II de Rostrenen, tinha 75 anos e sua mãe, Mahete de Fougères, tinha 75 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de PARTHENAY aproximadamente 1235. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre III de ROSTRENEN родился около 1210 г. в местности ростринен, кoтес-ду-норд, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Pierre II de Rostrenen было 75 лет, а матери, которую звали Mahete de Fougères, 75. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de PARTHENAY около 1235 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre III de ROSTRENEN nació aproximadamente 1210, en Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Pierre II de Rostrenen, tenía 75 años y su mamá, Mahete de Fougères, tenía 75 años. Se casó con Jeanne de PARTHENAY aproximadamente 1235. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
